title: BHN CrowdSec Decisions
description: Active CrowdSec decisions per node — bans, captchas, throttles. Populated by bhn-crowdsec-collector.sh every 5 min.

panels.title: Active decisions per node over time

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(measured_at, '5m') AS time, node_name AS metric, COUNT(DISTINCT decision_id) AS active_count FROM crowdsec_decisions WHERE $__timeFilter(measured_at) GROUP BY 1, node_name ORDER BY 1

WITH latest AS (SELECT node_name, MAX(measured_at) AS m FROM crowdsec_decisions GROUP BY node_name) SELECT cd.node_name, cd.type, cd.value, cd.scope, cd.scenario, cd.expires_at, cd.duration_s FROM crowdsec_decisions cd JOIN latest l ON cd.node_name=l.node_name AND cd.measured_at=l.m ORDER BY cd.node_name, cd.expires_at NULLS LAST

SELECT scenario, COUNT(DISTINCT (node_name, decision_id)) AS unique_decisions, COUNT(DISTINCT value) AS unique_targets FROM crowdsec_decisions WHERE measured_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' GROUP BY scenario ORDER BY unique_decisions DESC LIMIT 25
